description: Structural similarity screening using ChemBERTa-77M-MTR embeddings. Scores candidates by cosine similarity to known reference antibiotics. This is a structural-similarity proxy for bioactivity, not a trained classifier.

reference_antibiotics.name: Penicillin G
reference_antibiotics.notes: First widely-used antibiotic, targets cell wall synthesis

reference_antibiotics.name: Amoxicillin
reference_antibiotics.notes: Broad-spectrum, one of the most prescribed antibiotics worldwide

reference_antibiotics.name: Tetracycline
reference_antibiotics.notes: Inhibits protein synthesis by blocking tRNA binding

reference_antibiotics.name: Erythromycin
reference_antibiotics.notes: Inhibits 50S ribosomal subunit, treats gram-positive infections

reference_antibiotics.name: Trimethoprim
reference_antibiotics.notes: Inhibits dihydrofolate reductase, often combined with sulfonamides

reference_antibiotics.name: Vancomycin
reference_antibiotics.notes: Last-resort antibiotic for MRSA, targets cell wall (simplified SMILES fragment)

reference_antibiotics.name: Halicin (SU3327)
reference_antibiotics.notes: Discovered by MIT AI screening (2020), novel mechanism disrupting ion gradients

reference_antibiotics.name: Metronidazole
reference_antibiotics.notes: Targets anaerobic bacteria and protozoa via DNA damage
